message:
test(ftui-extras): add 11 proptest invariants for mermaid render pipeline

Property-based tests covering render_diagram and render_diagram_adaptive:
render never panics, determinism, plan consistency, adaptive plan validity,
all diagram types renderable, zero-area resilience, large area resilience,
full pipeline parse→layout→render, offset area rendering, empty graph rendering.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
